title: Intro to multi-agent systems with ADK
summary: Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) is a framework that simplifies the building and testing of agents. It enables creation of multi-agent systems with custom tools like real-time data retrieval and web search, plus built-in web interface debugging.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial introduces the Agent Development Kit (ADK), a framework for building and testing multi-agent systems. It walks through creating agents and equipping them with custom tools, including real-time date retrieval and Google Search, and using a web interface to debug them. Connecting agents to live tools matters because it addresses hallucinations by grounding responses in current data rather than relying on a model's internal knowledge alone.
